text.content:
• @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.RKfT6vJ5guinSBjo]{Gaedren Lamm} (L2) — first villain; frail sniper who weaponizes Gobblegut. A13.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.7uhbgkK2IOZOlJb3]{Yargin Balko} (L1) — acid-throwing fence; flees to warn Gaedren. A6.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.qH96VshE6CZqfajv]{Hookshanks Gruller} (L1) — gnome taskmaster hiding among orphans; can inform. A7.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.mHUhxeaalWkTU1h4]{Giggles} (L1) — half-orc bruiser; nonlethal capturer. A8.

Rationale & stat-design notes: reports/npc_monster_conversion_report.md.

• @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.2rMLYkUR47ZCQMUg]{Gobblegut} — use the official Crocodile (L2); rename the token. The real threat in E8.
  • @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.pathfinder-monster-core.Actor.KHTYbQgR5hnFZdGL]{Bloo} — use the official Guard Dog (L−1); the alarm dog. A4/A8.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.1M94tm3wnSRGcTG5]{Drain Spider} (L−1) — nest vermin; repelled by vermin repellent. A10/A11.
  • @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.lsdWSvGJ81hDy4it]{Jigsaw Shark} (L1) — under-fishery hazard-creature; avoidable. A12.

@UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-actors.Actor.UQr3ApF78GW7eghw]{Lamm's Lambs} are non-combatants and the moral core of the dungeon. 9 by day, 26 at night (A8). Rally with Diplomacy DC 15 (Intimidation fails). They can Aid or reveal info; ignored, they may be forced to act for the thugs. Never an XP source for killing. Rescuing them is the chapter's heart (and a background payoff for 'Missing Child').

Zellara — the murdered fortune-teller, now a benign spirit bound to @UUID[Compendium.cotct-pf2e-conversion.cotct-items.Item.DPDen8gco6rznX9Y]{her harrow deck}. She convenes the PCs and performs the recurring Harrowing. Run as a story NPC (no stat block). The deck is recovered in A14 and anchors the Harrow subsystem (CHG-0010).
